title: Method: panes.list
text:
Method name: `panes.list`

Parameters: None required. The `params` field MAY be `null` or an empty object.

The plugin MUST return a JSON array of pane objects. Each pane object MUST contain the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string | Pane identifier in the format `terminal:N` or `plugin:N`. |
| `pane_type` | string | Either `"terminal"` or `"plugin"`. |
| `title` | string | The pane's current title. |
| `command` | string or null | The terminal command running in the pane, or `null` if not applicable. |
| `tab_index` | integer | Zero-based index of the tab containing this pane. |
| `tab_name` | string | Display name of the containing tab. |
| `focused` | boolean | `true` if this pane is the currently focused pane (as determined by the `focused` selector resolution logic). |
| `floating` | boolean | `true` if this is a floating pane. |
| `suppressed` | boolean | `true` if this pane is suppressed (hidden behind another pane). |
| `rows` | integer | Number of content rows (terminal height). |
| `cols` | integer | Number of content columns (terminal width). |

Suppressed panes MUST be included in the listing. The `focused` field MUST be `true` for exactly one pane (the one that the `focused` selector would resolve to), or `false` for all panes if no focused pane can be determined.
